title: No-false-green contract gate
description: Machine-verifiable alignment of canonical gate statuses, runtime-budget neverTreatAsPassed, release pass semantics, and validator envelope vocabulary. Run before or alongside release gate for contract drift detection.
requiredEvidence: verify-gate-results JSON ok (gate-status-contract, runtime-budget, release passInterpretation, envelope enum)
verify-quality-gates structural JSON ok (includes strict domain gate file)
strictModeBehavior: Same non-pass semantics as release gate: only envelope status ok counts as pass; skip, warn, fail, unknown, degraded, blocked, not_run, and aliases skipped are never pass.
